<svg width="400px" height="490px" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">

    <desc>vis</desc>

    <defs>
        <style type="text/css">
        <![CDATA[
        /* general setup */
    :root {
        --bg-color:#f1f1f1;
        --text-color: #6e6b5e;
    }
    
    svg {
        background-color: var(--bg-color);
    }
    
    text {
        vertical-align: baseline;
        text-anchor: start;
    }
    
    #heading {
        font-size: 24px;
        font-weight: bold;
    }
    
    #caption {
        font-size: 0.875em;
        font-family: "Open Sans", sans-serif;
        font-style: italic;
    }
    
    /* code related styling */
    text.code {
        fill: #6e6b5e;
        white-space: pre;
        font-family: "Source Code Pro", Consolas, "Ubuntu Mono", Menlo, "DejaVu Sans Mono", monospace, monospace !important;
        font-size: 0.875em;
    }

    text.code .kw {
        font-weight: bold;
    }

    text.code .comment {
        fill: #8a8a8a;
        font-style: italic;
    }

    text.code .string {
        fill: #3a6bb5;
    }

    text.label {
        font-family: "Source Code Pro", Consolas, "Ubuntu Mono", Menlo, "DejaVu Sans Mono", monospace, monospace !important;
        font-size: 0.875em;
    }
    
    /* timeline/event interaction styling */
    .solid {
        stroke-width: 5px;
    }
    
    .hollow {
        stroke-width: 1.5;
    }
    
    .dotted {
        stroke-width: 5px;
        stroke-dasharray: "2 1";
    }
    
    .extend {
        stroke-width: 1px;
        stroke-dasharray: "2 1";
    }
    
    .functionIcon {
        paint-order: stroke;
        stroke-width: 3px;
        fill: var(--bg-color);
        font-size: 20px;
        font-family: times;
        font-weight: lighter;
        dominant-baseline: central;
        text-anchor: start;
        font-style: italic;
    }
    
    .functionLogo {
        font-size: 20px;
        font-style: italic;
        paint-order: stroke;
        stroke-width: 3px;
        fill: var(--bg-color) !important;
    }
    
    /* flex related styling */
    .flex-container {
        display: flex;
        flex-direction: row;
        justify-content: flex-start;
        flex-wrap: nowrap;
        flex-shrink: 0;
    }
    
    object.tl_panel {
        flex-grow: 1;
    }
    
    object.code_panel {
        flex-grow: 0;
    }
    
    .tooltip-trigger {
        cursor: default;
    }
    
    .tooltip-trigger:hover{
        filter: url(#glow);
    }
    
    /* hash based styling */
    [data-hash="0"] {
        fill: #6e6b5e;
    }
    
    [data-hash="1"] {
        fill: #1893ff;
        stroke: #1893ff;
    }
    
    [data-hash="2"] {
        fill: #ff7f50;
        stroke: #ff7f50;
    }
    
    [data-hash="3"] {
        fill: #8635ff;
        stroke: #8635ff;
    }
    
    [data-hash="4"] {
        fill: #dc143c;
        stroke: #dc143c;
    }
    
    [data-hash="5"] {
        fill: #0a810a;
        stroke: #0a810a;
    }
    
    [data-hash="6"] {
        fill: #008080;
        stroke: #008080;
    }
    
    [data-hash="7"] {
        fill: #ff6cce;
        stroke: #ff6cce;
    }
    
    [data-hash="8"] {
        fill: #00d6fc;
        stroke: #00d6fc;
    }
    
    [data-hash="9"] {
        fill: #b99f35;
        stroke: #b99f35;
    }
    [data-hash="10"] {
        fill: #15a710;
        stroke: #15a710;
    }
    [data-hash="11"] {
        fill: #000000;
        stroke: #000000;
    }
    [data-hash="12"] {
        fill: #463ae9;
        stroke: #463ae9;
    }
        ]]>
        </style>
    </defs>

    <g>
        <text id="caption" x="30" y="30">Hover over timeline events (dots), states (vertical lines),</text>
        <text id="caption" x="30" y="50">and actions (arrows) for extra information.</text>
    </g>

        <g id="code">
        <text class="code" x="20" y="90"> <tspan fill="#AAA"> 1  </tspan><tspan class="kw">fn</tspan> main() { </text>
        <text class="code" x="20" y="120"> <tspan fill="#AAA"> 2  </tspan>    <tspan class="kw">let</tspan> <tspan class="kw">mut</tspan> <tspan data-hash="2">s</tspan> = <tspan class="fn" data-hash="0" hash="1">String::from</tspan>(<tspan class="string">"hello"</tspan>); </text>
        <text class="code" x="20" y="150"> <tspan fill="#AAA"> 3  </tspan>    <tspan class="kw">let</tspan> <tspan class="kw">mut</tspan> <tspan data-hash="3">q</tspan> = <tspan class="fn" data-hash="0" hash="1">String::from</tspan>(<tspan class="string">"skipped"</tspan>); </text>
        <text class="code" x="20" y="180"> <tspan fill="#AAA"> 4  </tspan> </text>
        <text class="code" x="20" y="210"> <tspan fill="#AAA"> 5  </tspan>    <tspan class="kw">let</tspan> <tspan data-hash="4">r1</tspan> = &<tspan data-hash="2">s</tspan>; </text>
        <text class="code" x="20" y="240"> <tspan fill="#AAA"> 6  </tspan>    <tspan class="kw">let</tspan> <tspan data-hash="5">r2</tspan> = &<tspan data-hash="2">s</tspan>; </text>
        <text class="code" x="20" y="270"> <tspan fill="#AAA"> 7  </tspan>    assert!(compare_strings(r1, r2)); </text>
        <text class="code" x="20" y="300"> <tspan fill="#AAA"> 8  </tspan> </text>
        <text class="code" x="20" y="330"> <tspan fill="#AAA"> 9  </tspan>    <tspan class="kw">let</tspan> <tspan data-hash="7">r3</tspan> = &<tspan class="kw">mut</tspan> <tspan data-hash="2">s</tspan>; </text>
        <text class="code" x="20" y="360"> <tspan fill="#AAA">10  </tspan>    <tspan class="fn" data-hash="0" hash="8">clear_string</tspan>(<tspan data-hash="7">r3</tspan>); </text>
        <text class="code" x="20" y="390"> <tspan fill="#AAA">11  </tspan>} </text>
    </g>


</svg>

        <!-- used when pass to function by ref -->

             <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="5" fill="transparent"/>
             <text class="functionIcon" dx="-3.5" dy="0" fill="#6e6b5e">f</text>
        </g>
        <marker id="arrowHead" viewBox="0 0 10 10"
            refX="0" refY="4"
            markerUnits="strokeWidth"
            markerWidth="3px" markerHeight="3px"
            orient="auto" fill="gray">
            <path d="M 0 0 L 8.5 4 L 0 8 z" fill="inherit"/>
        </marker>
        <!-- glow highlight filter -->
        <filter id="glow" x="-5000%" y="-5000%" width="10000%" height="10000%" filterUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
            <feComposite in="flood" result="mask" in2="SourceGraphic" operator="in"></feComposite>
            <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="2" result="coloredBlur"/>
            <feMerge>
                <feMergeNode in="coloredBlur"></feMergeNode>
                <feMergeNode in="coloredBlur"></feMergeNode>
                <feMergeNode in="coloredBlur"></feMergeNode>
                <feMergeNode in="SourceGraphic"></feMergeNode>
            </feMerge>
            <!-- increase brightness -->
            <feComponentTransfer>
                <feFuncR type="linear" slope="2"/>
                <feFuncG type="linear" slope="2"/>
                <feFuncB type="linear" slope="2"/>
            </feComponentTransfer>
        </filter>

a08c8059f2a63aac1c7c03269057a9bebe0ec2ed.code_panel:
<svg width="400px" height="280px" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">

    <desc>vis</desc>

    <defs>
        <style type="text/css">
        <![CDATA[
        /* general setup */
    :root {
        --bg-color:#f1f1f1;
        --text-color: #6e6b5e;
    }
    
    svg {
        background-color: var(--bg-color);
    }
    
    text {
        vertical-align: baseline;
        text-anchor: start;
    }
    
    #heading {
        font-size: 24px;
        font-weight: bold;
    }
    
    #caption {
        font-size: 0.875em;
        font-family: "Open Sans", sans-serif;
        font-style: italic;
    }
    
    /* code related styling */
    text.code {
        fill: #6e6b5e;
        white-space: pre;
        font-family: "Source Code Pro", Consolas, "Ubuntu Mono", Menlo, "DejaVu Sans Mono", monospace, monospace !important;
        font-size: 0.875em;
    }

    text.code .kw {
        font-weight: bold;
    }

    text.code .comment {
        fill: #8a8a8a;
        font-style: italic;
    }

    text.code .string {
        fill: #3a6bb5;
    }

    text.label {
        font-family: "Source Code Pro", Consolas, "Ubuntu Mono", Menlo, "DejaVu Sans Mono", monospace, monospace !important;
        font-size: 0.875em;
    }
    
    /* timeline/event interaction styling */
    .solid {
        stroke-width: 5px;
    }
    
    .hollow {
        stroke-width: 1.5;
    }
    
    .dotted {
        stroke-width: 5px;
        stroke-dasharray: "2 1";
    }
    
    .extend {
        stroke-width: 1px;
        stroke-dasharray: "2 1";
    }
    
    .functionIcon {
        paint-order: stroke;
        stroke-width: 3px;
        fill: var(--bg-color);
        font-size: 20px;
        font-family: times;
        font-weight: lighter;
        dominant-baseline: central;
        text-anchor: start;
        font-style: italic;
    }
    
    .functionLogo {
        font-size: 20px;
        font-style: italic;
        paint-order: stroke;
        stroke-width: 3px;
        fill: var(--bg-color) !important;
    }
    
    /* flex related styling */
    .flex-container {
        display: flex;
        flex-direction: row;
        justify-content: flex-start;
        flex-wrap: nowrap;
        flex-shrink: 0;
    }
    
    object.tl_panel {
        flex-grow: 1;
    }
    
    object.code_panel {
        flex-grow: 0;
    }
    
    .tooltip-trigger {
        cursor: default;
    }
    
    .tooltip-trigger:hover{
        filter: url(#glow);
    }
    
    /* hash based styling */
    [data-hash="0"] {
        fill: #6e6b5e;
    }
    
    [data-hash="1"] {
        fill: #1893ff;
        stroke: #1893ff;
    }
    
    [data-hash="2"] {
        fill: #ff7f50;
        stroke: #ff7f50;
    }
    
    [data-hash="3"] {
        fill: #8635ff;
        stroke: #8635ff;
    }
    
    [data-hash="4"] {
        fill: #dc143c;
        stroke: #dc143c;
    }
    
    [data-hash="5"] {
        fill: #0a810a;
        stroke: #0a810a;
    }
    
    [data-hash="6"] {
        fill: #008080;
        stroke: #008080;
    }
    
    [data-hash="7"] {
        fill: #ff6cce;
        stroke: #ff6cce;
    }
    
    [data-hash="8"] {
        fill: #00d6fc;
        stroke: #00d6fc;
    }
    
    [data-hash="9"] {
        fill: #b99f35;
        stroke: #b99f35;
    }
    [data-hash="10"] {
        fill: #15a710;
        stroke: #15a710;
    }
    [data-hash="11"] {
        fill: #000000;
        stroke: #000000;
    }
    [data-hash="12"] {
        fill: #463ae9;
        stroke: #463ae9;
    }
        ]]>
        </style>
    </defs>

    <g>
        <text id="caption" x="30" y="30">Hover over timeline events (dots), states (vertical lines),</text>
        <text id="caption" x="30" y="50">and actions (arrows) for extra information.</text>
    </g>

        <g id="code">
        <text class="code" x="20" y="90"> <tspan fill="#AAA">1  </tspan><tspan class="kw">fn</tspan> main() { </text>
        <text class="code" x="20" y="120"> <tspan fill="#AAA">2  </tspan>    <tspan class="kw">let</tspan> <tspan data-hash="2">s</tspan> = <tspan class="fn" data-hash="0" hash="1">String::from</tspan>(<tspan class="string">"hello"</tspan>); </text>
        <text class="code" x="20" y="150"> <tspan fill="#AAA">3  </tspan>    println!(<tspan class="string">"{}"</tspan>, s); </text>
        <text class="code" x="20" y="180"> <tspan fill="#AAA">4  </tspan>} </text>
    </g>


</svg>

e3e26e27d962e3769c6e463684027412f6082c2e.code_panel:
<svg width="400px" height="310px" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">

    <desc>vis</desc>

    <defs>
        <style type="text/css">
        <![CDATA[
        /* general setup */
    :root {
        --bg-color:#f1f1f1;
        --text-color: #6e6b5e;
    }
    
    svg {
        background-color: var(--bg-color);
    }
    
    text {
        vertical-align: baseline;
        text-anchor: start;
    }
    
    #heading {
        font-size: 24px;
        font-weight: bold;
    }
    
    #caption {
        font-size: 0.875em;
        font-family: "Open Sans", sans-serif;
        font-style: italic;
    }
    
    /* code related styling */
    text.code {
        fill: #6e6b5e;
        white-space: pre;
        font-family: "Source Code Pro", Consolas, "Ubuntu Mono", Menlo, "DejaVu Sans Mono", monospace, monospace !important;
        font-size: 0.875em;
    }

    text.code .kw {
        font-weight: bold;
    }

    text.code .comment {
        fill: #8a8a8a;
        font-style: italic;
    }

    text.code .string {
        fill: #3a6bb5;
    }

    text.label {
        font-family: "Source Code Pro", Consolas, "Ubuntu Mono", Menlo, "DejaVu Sans Mono", monospace, monospace !important;
        font-size: 0.875em;
    }
    
    /* timeline/event interaction styling */
    .solid {
        stroke-width: 5px;
    }
    
    .hollow {
        stroke-width: 1.5;
    }
    
    .dotted {
        stroke-width: 5px;
        stroke-dasharray: "2 1";
    }
    
    .extend {
        stroke-width: 1px;
        stroke-dasharray: "2 1";
    }
    
    .functionIcon {
        paint-order: stroke;
        stroke-width: 3px;
        fill: var(--bg-color);
        font-size: 20px;
        font-family: times;
        font-weight: lighter;
        dominant-baseline: central;
        text-anchor: start;
        font-style: italic;
    }
    
    .functionLogo {
        font-size: 20px;
        font-style: italic;
        paint-order: stroke;
        stroke-width: 3px;
        fill: var(--bg-color) !important;
    }
    
    /* flex related styling */
    .flex-container {
        display: flex;
        flex-direction: row;
        justify-content: flex-start;
        flex-wrap: nowrap;
        flex-shrink: 0;
    }
    
    object.tl_panel {
        flex-grow: 1;
    }
    
    object.code_panel {
        flex-grow: 0;
    }
    
    .tooltip-trigger {
        cursor: default;
    }
    
    .tooltip-trigger:hover{
        filter: url(#glow);
    }
    
    /* hash based styling */
    [data-hash="0"] {
        fill: #6e6b5e;
    }
    
    [data-hash="1"] {
        fill: #1893ff;
        stroke: #1893ff;
    }
    
    [data-hash="2"] {
        fill: #ff7f50;
        stroke: #ff7f50;
    }
    
    [data-hash="3"] {
        fill: #8635ff;
        stroke: #8635ff;
    }
    
    [data-hash="4"] {
        fill: #dc143c;
        stroke: #dc143c;
    }
    
    [data-hash="5"] {
        fill: #0a810a;
        stroke: #0a810a;
    }
    
    [data-hash="6"] {
        fill: #008080;
        stroke: #008080;
    }
    
    [data-hash="7"] {
        fill: #ff6cce;
        stroke: #ff6cce;
    }
    
    [data-hash="8"] {
        fill: #00d6fc;
        stroke: #00d6fc;
    }
    
    [data-hash="9"] {
        fill: #b99f35;
        stroke: #b99f35;
    }
    [data-hash="10"] {
        fill: #15a710;
        stroke: #15a710;
    }
    [data-hash="11"] {
        fill: #000000;
        stroke: #000000;
    }
    [data-hash="12"] {
        fill: #463ae9;
        stroke: #463ae9;
    }
        ]]>
        </style>
    </defs>

    <g>
        <text id="caption" x="30" y="30">Hover over timeline events (dots), states (vertical lines),</text>
        <text id="caption" x="30" y="50">and actions (arrows) for extra information.</text>
    </g>

        <g id="code">
        <text class="code" x="20" y="90"> <tspan fill="#AAA">1  </tspan><tspan class="kw">fn</tspan> main() { </text>
        <text class="code" x="20" y="120"> <tspan fill="#AAA">2  </tspan>    <tspan class="kw">let</tspan> <tspan data-hash="2">x</tspan> = <tspan class="fn" data-hash="0" hash="1">String::from</tspan>(<tspan class="string">"hello"</tspan>); </text>
        <text class="code" x="20" y="150"> <tspan fill="#AAA">3  </tspan>    <tspan class="kw">let</tspan> <tspan class="kw">mut</tspan> <tspan data-hash="3">y</tspan> = <tspan class="fn" data-hash="0" hash="1">String::from</tspan>(<tspan class="string">"test"</tspan>); </text>
        <text class="code" x="20" y="180"> <tspan fill="#AAA">4  </tspan>    <tspan data-hash="3">y</tspan> = <tspan data-hash="2">x</tspan>; </text>
        <text class="code" x="20" y="210"> <tspan fill="#AAA">5  </tspan>} </text>
    </g>


</svg>

<svg width="589px" height="460px" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">

    <desc>vis</desc>

    <defs>
        <style type="text/css">
        <![CDATA[
        /* general setup */
    :root {
        --bg-color:#f1f1f1;
        --text-color: #6e6b5e;
    }
    
    svg {
        background-color: var(--bg-color);
    }
    
    text {
        vertical-align: baseline;
        text-anchor: start;
    }
    
    #heading {
        font-size: 24px;
        font-weight: bold;
    }
    
    #caption {
        font-size: 0.875em;
        font-family: "Open Sans", sans-serif;
        font-style: italic;
    }
    
    /* code related styling */
    text.code {
        fill: #6e6b5e;
        white-space: pre;
        font-family: "Source Code Pro", Consolas, "Ubuntu Mono", Menlo, "DejaVu Sans Mono", monospace, monospace !important;
        font-size: 0.875em;
    }

    text.code .kw {
        font-weight: bold;
    }

    text.code .comment {
        fill: #8a8a8a;
        font-style: italic;
    }

    text.code .string {
        fill: #3a6bb5;
    }

    text.label {
        font-family: "Source Code Pro", Consolas, "Ubuntu Mono", Menlo, "DejaVu Sans Mono", monospace, monospace !important;
        font-size: 0.875em;
    }
    
    /* timeline/event interaction styling */
    .solid {
        stroke-width: 5px;
    }
    
    .hollow {
        stroke-width: 1.5;
    }
    
    .dotted {
        stroke-width: 5px;
        stroke-dasharray: "2 1";
    }
    
    .extend {
        stroke-width: 1px;
        stroke-dasharray: "2 1";
    }
    
    .functionIcon {
        paint-order: stroke;
        stroke-width: 3px;
        fill: var(--bg-color);
        font-size: 20px;
        font-family: times;
        font-weight: lighter;
        dominant-baseline: central;
        text-anchor: start;
        font-style: italic;
    }
    
    .functionLogo {
        font-size: 20px;
        font-style: italic;
        paint-order: stroke;
        stroke-width: 3px;
        fill: var(--bg-color) !important;
    }
    
    /* flex related styling */
    .flex-container {
        display: flex;
        flex-direction: row;
        justify-content: flex-start;
        flex-wrap: nowrap;
        flex-shrink: 0;
    }
    
    object.tl_panel {
        flex-grow: 1;
    }
    
    object.code_panel {
        flex-grow: 0;
    }
    
    .tooltip-trigger {
        cursor: default;
    }
    
    .tooltip-trigger:hover{
        filter: url(#glow);
    }
    
    /* hash based styling */
    [data-hash="0"] {
        fill: #6e6b5e;
    }
    
    [data-hash="1"] {
        fill: #1893ff;
        stroke: #1893ff;
    }
    
    [data-hash="2"] {
        fill: #ff7f50;
        stroke: #ff7f50;
    }
    
    [data-hash="3"] {
        fill: #8635ff;
        stroke: #8635ff;
    }
    
    [data-hash="4"] {
        fill: #dc143c;
        stroke: #dc143c;
    }
    
    [data-hash="5"] {
        fill: #0a810a;
        stroke: #0a810a;
    }
    
    [data-hash="6"] {
        fill: #008080;
        stroke: #008080;
    }
    
    [data-hash="7"] {
        fill: #ff6cce;
        stroke: #ff6cce;
    }
    
    [data-hash="8"] {
        fill: #00d6fc;
        stroke: #00d6fc;
    }
    
    [data-hash="9"] {
        fill: #b99f35;
        stroke: #b99f35;
    }
    [data-hash="10"] {
        fill: #15a710;
        stroke: #15a710;
    }
    [data-hash="11"] {
        fill: #000000;
        stroke: #000000;
    }
    [data-hash="12"] {
        fill: #463ae9;
        stroke: #463ae9;
    }
        ]]>
        </style>
    </defs>

    <g>
        <text id="caption" x="30" y="30">Hover over timeline events (dots), states (vertical lines),</text>
        <text id="caption" x="30" y="50">and actions (arrows) for extra information.</text>
    </g>

        <g id="code">
        <text class="code" x="20" y="90"> <tspan fill="#AAA"> 1  </tspan><tspan class="kw">fn</tspan> <tspan class="fn" data-hash="0" hash="4">take_and_return_ownership</tspan>(<tspan data-hash="1">some_string</tspan>: String) -> String { </text>
        <text class="code" x="20" y="120"> <tspan fill="#AAA"> 2  </tspan>    println!(<tspan class="string">"{}"</tspan>, some_string); </text>
        <text class="code" x="20" y="150"> <tspan fill="#AAA"> 3  </tspan>    <tspan data-hash="1">some_string</tspan> </text>
        <text class="code" x="20" y="180"> <tspan fill="#AAA"> 4  </tspan>} </text>
        <text class="code" x="20" y="210"> <tspan fill="#AAA"> 5  </tspan> </text>
        <text class="code" x="20" y="240"> <tspan fill="#AAA"> 6  </tspan><tspan class="kw">fn</tspan> main() { </text>
        <text class="code" x="20" y="270"> <tspan fill="#AAA"> 7  </tspan>    <tspan class="kw">let</tspan> <tspan class="kw">mut</tspan> <tspan data-hash="3">s</tspan> = <tspan class="fn" data-hash="0" hash="2">String::from</tspan>(<tspan class="string">"hello"</tspan>); </text>
        <text class="code" x="20" y="300"> <tspan fill="#AAA"> 8  </tspan>    <tspan data-hash="3">s</tspan> = <tspan class="fn" data-hash="0" hash="4">take_and_return_ownership</tspan>(<tspan data-hash="3">s</tspan>); </text>
        <text class="code" x="20" y="330"> <tspan fill="#AAA"> 9  </tspan>    println!(<tspan class="string">"{}"</tspan>, s);   <tspan class="comment">// OK</tspan> </text>
        <text class="code" x="20" y="360"> <tspan fill="#AAA">10  </tspan>} </text>
    </g>


</svg>

<svg width="535px" height="370px" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">

    <desc>vis</desc>

    <defs>
        <style type="text/css">
        <![CDATA[
        /* general setup */
    :root {
        --bg-color:#f1f1f1;
        --text-color: #6e6b5e;
    }
    
    svg {
        background-color: var(--bg-color);
    }
    
    text {
        vertical-align: baseline;
        text-anchor: start;
    }
    
    #heading {
        font-size: 24px;
        font-weight: bold;
    }
    
    #caption {
        font-size: 0.875em;
        font-family: "Open Sans", sans-serif;
        font-style: italic;
    }
    
    /* code related styling */
    text.code {
        fill: #6e6b5e;
        white-space: pre;
        font-family: "Source Code Pro", Consolas, "Ubuntu Mono", Menlo, "DejaVu Sans Mono", monospace, monospace !important;
        font-size: 0.875em;
    }

    text.code .kw {
        font-weight: bold;
    }

    text.code .comment {
        fill: #8a8a8a;
        font-style: italic;
    }

    text.code .string {
        fill: #3a6bb5;
    }

    text.label {
        font-family: "Source Code Pro", Consolas, "Ubuntu Mono", Menlo, "DejaVu Sans Mono", monospace, monospace !important;
        font-size: 0.875em;
    }
    
    /* timeline/event interaction styling */
    .solid {
        stroke-width: 5px;
    }
    
    .hollow {
        stroke-width: 1.5;
    }
    
    .dotted {
        stroke-width: 5px;
        stroke-dasharray: "2 1";
    }
    
    .extend {
        stroke-width: 1px;
        stroke-dasharray: "2 1";
    }
    
    .functionIcon {
        paint-order: stroke;
        stroke-width: 3px;
        fill: var(--bg-color);
        font-size: 20px;
        font-family: times;
        font-weight: lighter;
        dominant-baseline: central;
        text-anchor: start;
        font-style: italic;
    }
    
    .functionLogo {
        font-size: 20px;
        font-style: italic;
        paint-order: stroke;
        stroke-width: 3px;
        fill: var(--bg-color) !important;
    }
    
    /* flex related styling */
    .flex-container {
        display: flex;
        flex-direction: row;
        justify-content: flex-start;
        flex-wrap: nowrap;
        flex-shrink: 0;
    }
    
    object.tl_panel {
        flex-grow: 1;
    }
    
    object.code_panel {
        flex-grow: 0;
    }
    
    .tooltip-trigger {
        cursor: default;
    }
    
    .tooltip-trigger:hover{
        filter: url(#glow);
    }
    
    /* hash based styling */
    [data-hash="0"] {
        fill: #6e6b5e;
    }
    
    [data-hash="1"] {
        fill: #1893ff;
        stroke: #1893ff;
    }
    
    [data-hash="2"] {
        fill: #ff7f50;
        stroke: #ff7f50;
    }
    
    [data-hash="3"] {
        fill: #8635ff;
        stroke: #8635ff;
    }
    
    [data-hash="4"] {
        fill: #dc143c;
        stroke: #dc143c;
    }
    
    [data-hash="5"] {
        fill: #0a810a;
        stroke: #0a810a;
    }
    
    [data-hash="6"] {
        fill: #008080;
        stroke: #008080;
    }
    
    [data-hash="7"] {
        fill: #ff6cce;
        stroke: #ff6cce;
    }
    
    [data-hash="8"] {
        fill: #00d6fc;
        stroke: #00d6fc;
    }
    
    [data-hash="9"] {
        fill: #b99f35;
        stroke: #b99f35;
    }
    [data-hash="10"] {
        fill: #15a710;
        stroke: #15a710;
    }
    [data-hash="11"] {
        fill: #000000;
        stroke: #000000;
    }
    [data-hash="12"] {
        fill: #463ae9;
        stroke: #463ae9;
    }
        ]]>
        </style>
    </defs>

    <g>
        <text id="caption" x="30" y="30">Hover over timeline events (dots), states (vertical lines),</text>
        <text id="caption" x="30" y="50">and actions (arrows) for extra information.</text>
    </g>

        <g id="code">
        <text class="code" x="20" y="90"> <tspan fill="#AAA">1  </tspan><tspan class="kw">fn</tspan> main() { </text>

            <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="2" result="coloredBlur"/>
            <feMerge>

                <feFuncR type="linear" slope="2"/>
                <feFuncG type="linear" slope="2"/>
                <feFuncB type="linear" slope="2"/>
            </feComponentTransfer>

<svg width="350px" height="550px" 
        xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" 
        id="tl_vis">

    <desc>vis</desc>

    <defs>
        <style type="text/css">
        <![CDATA[
        /* general setup */
    :root {
        --bg-color:#f1f1f1;
        --text-color: #6e6b5e;
    }
    
    svg {
        background-color: var(--bg-color);
    }
    
    text {
        vertical-align: baseline;
        text-anchor: start;
    }
    
    #heading {
        font-size: 24px;
        font-weight: bold;
    }
    
    #caption {
        font-size: 0.875em;
        font-family: "Open Sans", sans-serif;
        font-style: italic;
    }
    
    /* code related styling */
    text.code {
        fill: #6e6b5e;
        white-space: pre;
        font-family: "Source Code Pro", Consolas, "Ubuntu Mono", Menlo, "DejaVu Sans Mono", monospace, monospace !important;
        font-size: 0.875em;
    }

    text.code .kw {
        font-weight: bold;
    }

    text.code .comment {
        fill: #8a8a8a;
        font-style: italic;
    }

    text.code .string {
        fill: #3a6bb5;
    }

    text.label {
        font-family: "Source Code Pro", Consolas, "Ubuntu Mono", Menlo, "DejaVu Sans Mono", monospace, monospace !important;
        font-size: 0.875em;
    }
    
    /* timeline/event interaction styling */
    .solid {
        stroke-width: 5px;
    }
    
    .hollow {
        stroke-width: 1.5;
    }
    
    .dotted {
        stroke-width: 5px;
        stroke-dasharray: "2 1";
    }
    
    .extend {
        stroke-width: 1px;
        stroke-dasharray: "2 1";
    }
    
    .functionIcon {
        paint-order: stroke;
        stroke-width: 3px;
        fill: var(--bg-color);
        font-size: 20px;
        font-family: times;
        font-weight: lighter;
        dominant-baseline: central;
        text-anchor: start;
        font-style: italic;
    }
    
    .functionLogo {
        font-size: 20px;
        font-style: italic;
        paint-order: stroke;
        stroke-width: 3px;
        fill: var(--bg-color) !important;
    }
    
    /* flex related styling */
    .flex-container {
        display: flex;
        flex-direction: row;
        justify-content: flex-start;
        flex-wrap: nowrap;
        flex-shrink: 0;
    }
    
    object.tl_panel {
        flex-grow: 1;
    }
    
    object.code_panel {
        flex-grow: 0;
    }
    
    .tooltip-trigger {
        cursor: default;
    }
    
    .tooltip-trigger:hover{
        filter: url(#glow);
    }
    
    /* hash based styling */
    [data-hash="0"] {
        fill: #6e6b5e;
    }
    
    [data-hash="1"] {
        fill: #1893ff;
        stroke: #1893ff;
    }
    
    [data-hash="2"] {
        fill: #ff7f50;
        stroke: #ff7f50;
    }
    
    [data-hash="3"] {
        fill: #8635ff;
        stroke: #8635ff;
    }
    
    [data-hash="4"] {
        fill: #dc143c;

    }
    
    [data-hash="5"] {
        fill: #0a810a;
        stroke: #0a810a;
    }
    
    [data-hash="6"] {
        fill: #008080;
        stroke: #008080;
    }
    
    [data-hash="7"] {

        stroke: #ff6cce;
    }
    
    [data-hash="8"] {
        fill: #00d6fc;
        stroke: #00d6fc;
    }
    
    [data-hash="9"] {
        fill: #b99f35;
        stroke: #b99f35;
    }
    [data-hash="10"] {
        fill: #15a710;
        stroke: #15a710;
    }
    [data-hash="11"] {
        fill: #000000;
        stroke: #000000;
    }
    [data-hash="12"] {
        fill: #463ae9;
        stroke: #463ae9;
    }
        
        text {
            user-select: none;
            -webkit-user-select: none;
            -moz-user-select: none;
            -ms-user-select: none;
        }

        </style>
        <!-- used when pass to function by ref -->
        <g id="functionDot">
             <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="5" fill="transparent"/>
             <text class="functionIcon" dx="-3.5" dy="0" fill="#6e6b5e">f</text>
        </g>
        <marker id="arrowHead" viewBox="0 0 10 10"
            refX="0" refY="4"
            markerUnits="strokeWidth"
            markerWidth="3px" markerHeight="3px"
            orient="auto" fill="gray">
            <path d="M 0 0 L 8.5 4 L 0 8 z" fill="inherit"/>
        </marker>
        <!-- glow highlight filter -->
        <filter id="glow" x="-5000%" y="-5000%" width="10000%" height="10000%" filterUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
            <feComposite in="flood" result="mask" in2="SourceGraphic" operator="in"></feComposite>
            <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="2" result="coloredBlur"/>
            <feMerge>
                <feMergeNode in="coloredBlur"></feMergeNode>
                <feMergeNode in="coloredBlur"></feMergeNode>
                <feMergeNode in="coloredBlur"></feMergeNode>
                <feMergeNode in="SourceGraphic"></feMergeNode>
            </feMerge>
            <!-- increase brightness -->
            <feComponentTransfer>
                <feFuncR type="linear" slope="2"/>
                <feFuncG type="linear" slope="2"/>
                <feFuncB type="linear" slope="2"/>
            </feComponentTransfer>
        </filter>

<svg width="339px" height="940px" 
        xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"

    <desc>vis</desc>

    <defs>
        <style type="text/css">
        <![CDATA[
        /* general setup */
    :root {
        --bg-color:#f1f1f1;
        --text-color: #6e6b5e;
    }
    
    svg {
        background-color: var(--bg-color);
    }
    
    text {
        vertical-align: baseline;
        text-anchor: start;
    }
    
    #heading {
        font-size: 24px;
        font-weight: bold;
    }
    
    #caption {
        font-size: 0.875em;
        font-family: "Open Sans", sans-serif;
        font-style: italic;
    }
    
    /* code related styling */
    text.code {
        fill: #6e6b5e;
        white-space: pre;
        font-family: "Source Code Pro", Consolas, "Ubuntu Mono", Menlo, "DejaVu Sans Mono", monospace, monospace !important;
        font-size: 0.875em;
    }

    text.code .kw {
        font-weight: bold;
    }

    text.code .comment {
        fill: #8a8a8a;
        font-style: italic;
    }

    text.code .string {
        fill: #3a6bb5;
    }

    text.label {
        font-family: "Source Code Pro", Consolas, "Ubuntu Mono", Menlo, "DejaVu Sans Mono", monospace, monospace !important;
        font-size: 0.875em;
    }
    
    /* timeline/event interaction styling */
    .solid {
        stroke-width: 5px;
    }
    
    .hollow {
        stroke-width: 1.5;
    }
    
    .dotted {
        stroke-width: 5px;
        stroke-dasharray: "2 1";
    }
    
    .extend {
        stroke-width: 1px;
        stroke-dasharray: "2 1";
    }
    
    .functionIcon {
        paint-order: stroke;
        stroke-width: 3px;
        fill: var(--bg-color);
        font-size: 20px;
        font-family: times;
        font-weight: lighter;
        dominant-baseline: central;
        text-anchor: start;
        font-style: italic;
    }
    
    .functionLogo {
        font-size: 20px;
        font-style: italic;
        paint-order: stroke;
        stroke-width: 3px;
        fill: var(--bg-color) !important;
    }
    
    /* flex related styling */
    .flex-container {
        display: flex;
        flex-direction: row;
        justify-content: flex-start;
        flex-wrap: nowrap;
        flex-shrink: 0;
    }
    
    object.tl_panel {
        flex-grow: 1;
    }
    
    object.code_panel {
        flex-grow: 0;
    }

        cursor: default;
    }

        filter: url(#glow);
    }

             <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="5" fill="transparent"/>
             <text class="functionIcon" dx="-3.5" dy="0" fill="#6e6b5e">f</text>
        </g>
        <marker id="arrowHead" viewBox="0 0 10 10"
            refX="0" refY="4"

            orient="auto" fill="gray">
            <path d="M 0 0 L 8.5 4 L 0 8 z" fill="inherit"/>
        </marker>
        <!-- glow highlight filter -->
        <filter id="glow" x="-5000%" y="-5000%" width="10000%" height="10000%" filterUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
            <feComposite in="flood" result="mask" in2="SourceGraphic" operator="in"></feComposite>
            <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="2" result="coloredBlur"/>
            <feMerge>
                <feMergeNode in="coloredBlur"></feMergeNode>
                <feMergeNode in="coloredBlur"></feMergeNode>
                <feMergeNode in="coloredBlur"></feMergeNode>
                <feMergeNode in="SourceGraphic"></feMergeNode>
            </feMerge>

            <feComponentTransfer>
                <feFuncR type="linear" slope="2"/>
                <feFuncG type="linear" slope="2"/>
                <feFuncB type="linear" slope="2"/>
            </feComponentTransfer>
        </filter>

    .flex-container {
        display: flex;

        justify-content: flex-start;
        flex-wrap: nowrap;
        flex-shrink: 0;

        flex-grow: 1;

        <filter id="glow" x="-5000%" y="-5000%" width="10000%" height="10000%" filterUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
            <feComposite in="flood" result="mask" in2="SourceGraphic" operator="in"></feComposite>

559a206557e0d4a1b2c7522ded865aaa6ca0ae72.code_panel:
<svg width="400px" height="340px" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">

    <desc>vis</desc>

    <defs>
        <style type="text/css">
        <![CDATA[
        /* general setup */
    :root {
        --bg-color:#f1f1f1;
        --text-color: #6e6b5e;
    }
    
    svg {
        background-color: var(--bg-color);
    }
    
    text {
        vertical-align: baseline;
        text-anchor: start;
    }
    
    #heading {
        font-size: 24px;
        font-weight: bold;
    }
    
    #caption {
        font-size: 0.875em;
        font-family: "Open Sans", sans-serif;
        font-style: italic;
    }
    
    /* code related styling */
    text.code {
        fill: #6e6b5e;
        white-space: pre;
        font-family: "Source Code Pro", Consolas, "Ubuntu Mono", Menlo, "DejaVu Sans Mono", monospace, monospace !important;
        font-size: 0.875em;
    }

    text.code .kw {
        font-weight: bold;
    }

    text.code .comment {
        fill: #8a8a8a;
        font-style: italic;
    }

    text.code .string {
        fill: #3a6bb5;
    }

    text.label {
        font-family: "Source Code Pro", Consolas, "Ubuntu Mono", Menlo, "DejaVu Sans Mono", monospace, monospace !important;
        font-size: 0.875em;
    }
    
    /* timeline/event interaction styling */
    .solid {
        stroke-width: 5px;
    }
    
    .hollow {
        stroke-width: 1.5;
    }
    
    .dotted {
        stroke-width: 5px;
        stroke-dasharray: "2 1";
    }
    
    .extend {
        stroke-width: 1px;
        stroke-dasharray: "2 1";
    }
    
    .functionIcon {
        paint-order: stroke;
        stroke-width: 3px;
        fill: var(--bg-color);
        font-size: 20px;
        font-family: times;
        font-weight: lighter;
        dominant-baseline: central;
        text-anchor: start;
        font-style: italic;
    }
    
    .functionLogo {
        font-size: 20px;
        font-style: italic;
        paint-order: stroke;
        stroke-width: 3px;
        fill: var(--bg-color) !important;
    }
    
    /* flex related styling */
    .flex-container {
        display: flex;
        flex-direction: row;
        justify-content: flex-start;
        flex-wrap: nowrap;
        flex-shrink: 0;
    }
    
    object.tl_panel {
        flex-grow: 1;
    }
    
    object.code_panel {
        flex-grow: 0;
    }
    
    .tooltip-trigger {
        cursor: default;
    }
    
    .tooltip-trigger:hover{
        filter: url(#glow);
    }
    
    /* hash based styling */
    [data-hash="0"] {
        fill: #6e6b5e;
    }
    
    [data-hash="1"] {
        fill: #1893ff;
        stroke: #1893ff;
    }
    
    [data-hash="2"] {
        fill: #ff7f50;
        stroke: #ff7f50;
    }
    
    [data-hash="3"] {
        fill: #8635ff;
        stroke: #8635ff;
    }
    
    [data-hash="4"] {
        fill: #dc143c;
        stroke: #dc143c;
    }
    
    [data-hash="5"] {
        fill: #0a810a;
        stroke: #0a810a;
    }
    
    [data-hash="6"] {
        fill: #008080;
        stroke: #008080;
    }
    
    [data-hash="7"] {
        fill: #ff6cce;
        stroke: #ff6cce;
    }
    
    [data-hash="8"] {
        fill: #00d6fc;
        stroke: #00d6fc;
    }
    
    [data-hash="9"] {
        fill: #b99f35;
        stroke: #b99f35;
    }
    [data-hash="10"] {
        fill: #15a710;
        stroke: #15a710;
    }
    [data-hash="11"] {
        fill: #000000;
        stroke: #000000;
    }
    [data-hash="12"] {
        fill: #463ae9;
        stroke: #463ae9;
    }
        ]]>
        </style>
    </defs>

    <g>
        <text id="caption" x="30" y="30">Hover over timeline events (dots), states (vertical lines),</text>
        <text id="caption" x="30" y="50">and actions (arrows) for extra information.</text>
    </g>

        <g id="code">
        <text class="code" x="20" y="90"> <tspan fill="#AAA">1  </tspan><tspan class="kw">fn</tspan> main() { </text>
        <text class="code" x="20" y="120"> <tspan fill="#AAA">2  </tspan>    <tspan class="kw">let</tspan> <tspan data-hash="2">s</tspan> = <tspan class="fn" data-hash="0" hash="1">String::from</tspan>(<tspan class="string">"hi"</tspan>); </text>
        <text class="code" x="20" y="150"> <tspan fill="#AAA">3  </tspan>    <tspan class="kw">let</tspan> <tspan data-hash="3">f</tspan> = || println!(<tspan class="string">"{}"</tspan>, s); </text>
        <text class="code" x="20" y="180"> <tspan fill="#AAA">4  </tspan>    <tspan class="fn" data-hash="0" hash="3">f</tspan>(); </text>
        <text class="code" x="20" y="210"> <tspan fill="#AAA">5  </tspan>    println!(<tspan class="string">"after: {}"</tspan>, s); </text>
        <text class="code" x="20" y="240"> <tspan fill="#AAA">6  </tspan>} </text>
    </g>


</svg>

c7a883286e02dae2f6f3c13b84897cbec9ec4785.code_panel:
<svg width="400px" height="340px" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">

    <desc>vis</desc>

    <defs>
        <style type="text/css">
        <![CDATA[
        /* general setup */
    :root {
        --bg-color:#f1f1f1;
        --text-color: #6e6b5e;
    }
    
    svg {
        background-color: var(--bg-color);
    }
    
    text {
        vertical-align: baseline;
        text-anchor: start;
    }
    
    #heading {
        font-size: 24px;
        font-weight: bold;
    }
    
    #caption {
        font-size: 0.875em;
        font-family: "Open Sans", sans-serif;
        font-style: italic;
    }
    
    /* code related styling */
    text.code {
        fill: #6e6b5e;
        white-space: pre;
        font-family: "Source Code Pro", Consolas, "Ubuntu Mono", Menlo, "DejaVu Sans Mono", monospace, monospace !important;
        font-size: 0.875em;
    }

    text.code .kw {
        font-weight: bold;
    }

    text.code .comment {
        fill: #8a8a8a;
        font-style: italic;
    }

    text.code .string {
        fill: #3a6bb5;
    }

    text.label {
        font-family: "Source Code Pro", Consolas, "Ubuntu Mono", Menlo, "DejaVu Sans Mono", monospace, monospace !important;
        font-size: 0.875em;
    }
    
    /* timeline/event interaction styling */
    .solid {
        stroke-width: 5px;
    }
    
    .hollow {
        stroke-width: 1.5;
    }
    
    .dotted {
        stroke-width: 5px;
        stroke-dasharray: "2 1";
    }
    
    .extend {
        stroke-width: 1px;
        stroke-dasharray: "2 1";
    }
    
    .functionIcon {
        paint-order: stroke;
        stroke-width: 3px;
        fill: var(--bg-color);
        font-size: 20px;
        font-family: times;
        font-weight: lighter;
        dominant-baseline: central;
        text-anchor: start;
        font-style: italic;
    }
    
    .functionLogo {
        font-size: 20px;
        font-style: italic;
        paint-order: stroke;
        stroke-width: 3px;
        fill: var(--bg-color) !important;
    }
    
    /* flex related styling */
    .flex-container {
        display: flex;
        flex-direction: row;
        justify-content: flex-start;
        flex-wrap: nowrap;
        flex-shrink: 0;
    }
    
    object.tl_panel {
        flex-grow: 1;
    }
    
    object.code_panel {
        flex-grow: 0;
    }
    
    .tooltip-trigger {
        cursor: default;
    }
    
    .tooltip-trigger:hover{
        filter: url(#glow);
    }
    
    /* hash based styling */
    [data-hash="0"] {
        fill: #6e6b5e;
    }
    
    [data-hash="1"] {
        fill: #1893ff;
        stroke: #1893ff;
    }
    
    [data-hash="2"] {
        fill: #ff7f50;
        stroke: #ff7f50;
    }
    
    [data-hash="3"] {
        fill: #8635ff;
        stroke: #8635ff;
    }
    
    [data-hash="4"] {
        fill: #dc143c;
        stroke: #dc143c;
    }
    
    [data-hash="5"] {
        fill: #0a810a;
        stroke: #0a810a;
    }
    
    [data-hash="6"] {
        fill: #008080;
        stroke: #008080;
    }
    
    [data-hash="7"] {
        fill: #ff6cce;
        stroke: #ff6cce;
    }
    
    [data-hash="8"] {
        fill: #00d6fc;
        stroke: #00d6fc;
    }
    
    [data-hash="9"] {
        fill: #b99f35;
        stroke: #b99f35;
    }
    [data-hash="10"] {
        fill: #15a710;
        stroke: #15a710;
    }
    [data-hash="11"] {
        fill: #000000;
        stroke: #000000;
    }
    [data-hash="12"] {
        fill: #463ae9;
        stroke: #463ae9;
    }
        ]]>
        </style>
    </defs>

    <g>
        <text id="caption" x="30" y="30">Hover over timeline events (dots), states (vertical lines),</text>
        <text id="caption" x="30" y="50">and actions (arrows) for extra information.</text>
    </g>

        <g id="code">
        <text class="code" x="20" y="90"> <tspan fill="#AAA">1  </tspan><tspan class="kw">fn</tspan> main() { </text>
        <text class="code" x="20" y="120"> <tspan fill="#AAA">2  </tspan>    <tspan class="kw">let</tspan> <tspan class="kw">mut</tspan> <tspan data-hash="2">s</tspan> = <tspan class="fn" data-hash="0" hash="1">String::from</tspan>(<tspan class="string">"hi"</tspan>); </text>
        <text class="code" x="20" y="150"> <tspan fill="#AAA">3  </tspan>    <tspan class="kw">let</tspan> <tspan class="kw">mut</tspan> <tspan data-hash="3">f</tspan> = || s.push_str(<tspan class="string">"!"</tspan>); </text>
        <text class="code" x="20" y="180"> <tspan fill="#AAA">4  </tspan>    <tspan class="fn" data-hash="0" hash="3">f</tspan>(); </text>
        <text class="code" x="20" y="210"> <tspan fill="#AAA">5  </tspan>    println!(<tspan class="string">"{}"</tspan>, s); </text>
        <text class="code" x="20" y="240"> <tspan fill="#AAA">6  </tspan>} </text>
    </g>


</svg>

    <desc>vis</desc>

    <defs>
        <style type="text/css">
        <![CDATA[
        /* general setup */
    :root {
        --bg-color:#f1f1f1;
        --text-color: #6e6b5e;
    }
    
    svg {
        background-color: var(--bg-color);
    }
    
    text {
        vertical-align: baseline;
        text-anchor: start;
    }
    
    #heading {
        font-size: 24px;
        font-weight: bold;
    }
    
    #caption {
        font-size: 0.875em;
        font-family: "Open Sans", sans-serif;
        font-style: italic;
    }
    
    /* code related styling */
    text.code {
        fill: #6e6b5e;
        white-space: pre;
        font-family: "Source Code Pro", Consolas, "Ubuntu Mono", Menlo, "DejaVu Sans Mono", monospace, monospace !important;
        font-size: 0.875em;
    }

    text.code .kw {
        font-weight: bold;
    }

    text.code .comment {
        fill: #8a8a8a;
        font-style: italic;
    }

    text.code .string {
        fill: #3a6bb5;
    }

    text.label {
        font-family: "Source Code Pro", Consolas, "Ubuntu Mono", Menlo, "DejaVu Sans Mono", monospace, monospace !important;
        font-size: 0.875em;
    }
    
    /* timeline/event interaction styling */
    .solid {
        stroke-width: 5px;
    }
    
    .hollow {
        stroke-width: 1.5;
    }
    
    .dotted {
        stroke-width: 5px;
        stroke-dasharray: "2 1";
    }
    
    .extend {
        stroke-width: 1px;
        stroke-dasharray: "2 1";
    }
    
    .functionIcon {
        paint-order: stroke;
        stroke-width: 3px;
        fill: var(--bg-color);
        font-size: 20px;
        font-family: times;
        font-weight: lighter;
        dominant-baseline: central;
        text-anchor: start;
        font-style: italic;
    }
    
    .functionLogo {
        font-size: 20px;
        font-style: italic;
        paint-order: stroke;
        stroke-width: 3px;
        fill: var(--bg-color) !important;
    }
    
    /* flex related styling */
    .flex-container {
        display: flex;
        flex-direction: row;
        justify-content: flex-start;
        flex-wrap: nowrap;
        flex-shrink: 0;
    }
    
    object.tl_panel {
        flex-grow: 1;
    }
    
    object.code_panel {
        flex-grow: 0;
    }
    
    .tooltip-trigger {
        cursor: default;
    }
    
    .tooltip-trigger:hover{
        filter: url(#glow);
    }

    [data-hash="0"] {
        fill: #6e6b5e;
    }
    
    [data-hash="1"] {
        fill: #1893ff;

        fill: #ff7f50;
        stroke: #ff7f50;
    }
    
    [data-hash="3"] {
        fill: #8635ff;
        stroke: #8635ff;
    }
    
    [data-hash="4"] {
        fill: #dc143c;
        stroke: #dc143c;
    }
    
    [data-hash="5"] {
        fill: #0a810a;
        stroke: #0a810a;
    }
    
    [data-hash="6"] {
        fill: #008080;
        stroke: #008080;
    }
    
    [data-hash="7"] {
        fill: #ff6cce;
        stroke: #ff6cce;
    }
    
    [data-hash="8"] {
        fill: #00d6fc;
        stroke: #00d6fc;
    }
    
    [data-hash="9"] {
        fill: #b99f35;
        stroke: #b99f35;
    }
    [data-hash="10"] {
        fill: #15a710;
        stroke: #15a710;
    }
    [data-hash="11"] {
        fill: #000000;
        stroke: #000000;
    }
    [data-hash="12"] {
        fill: #463ae9;
        stroke: #463ae9;
    }

    <g>
        <text id="caption" x="30" y="30">Hover over timeline events (dots), states (vertical lines),</text>

    </g>

        <text class="code" x="20" y="240"> <tspan fill="#AAA">6  </tspan>        <tspan class="fn" data-hash="0" hash="3">read</tspan>(<tspan data-hash="2">n</tspan>); </text>
        <text class="code" x="20" y="270"> <tspan fill="#AAA">7  </tspan>        <tspan data-hash="2">n</tspan> += 1; </text>
        <text class="code" x="20" y="300"> <tspan fill="#AAA">8  </tspan>    } </text>
        <text class="code" x="20" y="330"> <tspan fill="#AAA">9  </tspan>} </text>
    </g>


</svg>

<svg width="400px" height="400px" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">

    <desc>vis</desc>

    <defs>
        <style type="text/css">
        <![CDATA[
        /* general setup */
    :root {
        --bg-color:#f1f1f1;
        --text-color: #6e6b5e;
    }
    
    svg {
        background-color: var(--bg-color);
    }
    
    text {
        vertical-align: baseline;
        text-anchor: start;
    }
    
    #heading {
        font-size: 24px;
        font-weight: bold;
    }
    
    #caption {
        font-size: 0.875em;
        font-family: "Open Sans", sans-serif;
        font-style: italic;
    }
    
    /* code related styling */
    text.code {
        fill: #6e6b5e;
        white-space: pre;
        font-family: "Source Code Pro", Consolas, "Ubuntu Mono", Menlo, "DejaVu Sans Mono", monospace, monospace !important;
        font-size: 0.875em;
    }

    text.code .kw {
        font-weight: bold;
    }

    text.code .comment {
        fill: #8a8a8a;
        font-style: italic;
    }

    text.code .string {
        fill: #3a6bb5;
    }

    text.label {
        font-family: "Source Code Pro", Consolas, "Ubuntu Mono", Menlo, "DejaVu Sans Mono", monospace, monospace !important;
        font-size: 0.875em;
    }
    
    /* timeline/event interaction styling */
    .solid {
        stroke-width: 5px;
    }
    
    .hollow {
        stroke-width: 1.5;
    }
    
    .dotted {
        stroke-width: 5px;
        stroke-dasharray: "2 1";
    }
    
    .extend {
        stroke-width: 1px;
        stroke-dasharray: "2 1";
    }
    
    .functionIcon {
        paint-order: stroke;
        stroke-width: 3px;
        fill: var(--bg-color);
        font-size: 20px;
        font-family: times;
        font-weight: lighter;
        dominant-baseline: central;
        text-anchor: start;
        font-style: italic;
    }
    
    .functionLogo {
        font-size: 20px;
        font-style: italic;
        paint-order: stroke;
        stroke-width: 3px;
        fill: var(--bg-color) !important;
    }
    
    /* flex related styling */
    .flex-container {
        display: flex;
        flex-direction: row;
        justify-content: flex-start;
        flex-wrap: nowrap;
        flex-shrink: 0;
    }
    
    object.tl_panel {
        flex-grow: 1;
    }
    
    object.code_panel {
        flex-grow: 0;
    }
    
    .tooltip-trigger {
        cursor: default;
    }
    
    .tooltip-trigger:hover{
        filter: url(#glow);
    }
    
    /* hash based styling */
    [data-hash="0"] {
        fill: #6e6b5e;
    }
    
    [data-hash="1"] {
        fill: #1893ff;
        stroke: #1893ff;
    }
    
    [data-hash="2"] {
        fill: #ff7f50;
        stroke: #ff7f50;
    }
    
    [data-hash="3"] {
        fill: #8635ff;
        stroke: #8635ff;
    }
    
    [data-hash="4"] {
        fill: #dc143c;
        stroke: #dc143c;
    }
    
    [data-hash="5"] {
        fill: #0a810a;
        stroke: #0a810a;
    }
    
    [data-hash="6"] {
        fill: #008080;
        stroke: #008080;
    }
    
    [data-hash="7"] {
        fill: #ff6cce;
        stroke: #ff6cce;
    }
    
    [data-hash="8"] {
        fill: #00d6fc;
        stroke: #00d6fc;
    }
    
    [data-hash="9"] {
        fill: #b99f35;
        stroke: #b99f35;
    }
    [data-hash="10"] {
        fill: #15a710;
        stroke: #15a710;
    }
    [data-hash="11"] {
        fill: #000000;
        stroke: #000000;
    }
    [data-hash="12"] {
        fill: #463ae9;
        stroke: #463ae9;
    }
        ]]>
        </style>
    </defs>

    <g>
        <text id="caption" x="30" y="30">Hover over timeline events (dots), states (vertical lines),</text>
        <text id="caption" x="30" y="50">and actions (arrows) for extra information.</text>
    </g>

        <g id="code">
        <text class="code" x="20" y="90"> <tspan fill="#AAA">1  </tspan><tspan class="kw">fn</tspan> <tspan class="fn" data-hash="0" hash="5">read</tspan>(<tspan data-hash="1">_n</tspan>: i32) {} </text>
        <text class="code" x="20" y="120"> <tspan fill="#AAA">2  </tspan> </text>
        <text class="code" x="20" y="150"> <tspan fill="#AAA">3  </tspan><tspan class="kw">fn</tspan> main() { </text>
        <text class="code" x="20" y="180"> <tspan fill="#AAA">4  </tspan>    <tspan class="kw">let</tspan> <tspan data-hash="3">opt</tspan>: Option<i32> = <tspan class="fn" data-hash="0" hash="2">Some</tspan>(3); </text>
        <text class="code" x="20" y="210"> <tspan fill="#AAA">5  </tspan>    <tspan class="kw">if</tspan> <tspan class="kw">let</tspan> Some(<tspan data-hash="4">x</tspan>) = <tspan data-hash="3">opt</tspan> { </text>
        <text class="code" x="20" y="240"> <tspan fill="#AAA">6  </tspan>        <tspan class="fn" data-hash="0" hash="5">read</tspan>(<tspan data-hash="4">x</tspan>); </text>
        <text class="code" x="20" y="270"> <tspan fill="#AAA">7  </tspan>    } </text>
        <text class="code" x="20" y="300"> <tspan fill="#AAA">8  </tspan>} </text>
    </g>


</svg>
